name: Ynys-hir RSPB & Dyfi Estuary
highlights: Springwatch's long-time home — oak woods, salt marsh and tidal flats on the Dyfi.
points_of_interest: RSPB hides (Marian Mawr, Ynys Feurig); Springwatch studio site
viewpoints: Dyfi estuary panorama; woodland canopy walk
parking_start: RSPB Ynys-hir car park (entrance fee, members free)
food_drink_nearby: Ynys-hir Restaurant (Michelin); Dyfi Brewing tap; Y Llew Du Aberystwyth
public_transport: Train to Dovey Junction, 1.5 mi walk
hazards_notes: RSPB entrance fee for non-members; path closures during sensitive seasons
